channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S. and Iran Launch New Strikes After Three U.S. Service Members Killed
item.description: The U.S. attacks marked the ninth consecutive day of bombing after peace talks collapsed over a disputed memorandum.

item.title: Feeling Overwhelmed? Try These Four Skills to Lower Stress Intensity
item.description: A clinical psychologist shares quick strategies to reduce stress and anxiety, including dunking your head in ice water.

item.title: Disabled patients face Medicaid denials due to IT errors
item.description: Computer systems that determine Medicaid eligibility have a history of errors. Recent changes to comply with Trump's tax and domestic policies worsen the issue.

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: The U.S. launches strikes against Iran as fighting escalates. Congress faces a heavy workload before the August recess.
